summary: Both sections are present in correct order with the required eds-hero-banner signature class and accurate text content. However, the CTA button is positioned far too low—it appears below the visible banner in the render and the arrow icon is misplaced (x=426 vs 288), causing the entire button to be missing from the visible output.

issues.expected: 'Get to know YEZTUGO' pill button visible in lower-left of photo (design strip 5, button box y≈349.6)
issues.actual: Button is pushed off the visible banner area; render strip 5 shows no button at all
issues.fix: Reposition cta-wrapper so the pill renders within the 459px banner over the photo; verify top offset relative to banner not content block
Shift arrow horizontally to x≈288px via column/alignment adjustment

issues.expected: 'twice-yearly PrEP is here' rendered in white/light over the photo (design strip 4)
issues.actual: h1 sets color:#000000 on the title element with white only on inner spans; risk of mismatch though inner spans override—verify computed color
issues.fix: Ensure visible title lines use --gs-tertiary_10 (white) consistently; avoid setting black on parent

issues.expected: Title baseline aligned within banner (design strip 1-2)
issues.actual: Render shows 'treatment with TRODELVY' line partially clipped at banner bottom edge
issues.fix: Adjust hero-banner-content top so both title lines fit fully within 232px banner

issues.expected: Use design tokens for font sizes where available (e.g., bt2-line1 27.9px ~ h6/custom)
issues.actual: Many raw px font-sizes (25px, 27.9px, 46.49px, 15.58px, 11.62px) used instead of tokens
issues.fix: Map sizes to nearest design tokens where applicable; raw hex/px acceptable only when no token matches

issues.expected: Footnote color matches design (#000000 black for line-3/4 readability shown white on dark)
issues.actual: line3/line4 forced white but render strip 5 shows them legible—acceptable, verify contrast
issues.fix: Confirm footnote/body text colors match design strips

layoutFailures.fix: Shift horizontally to x≈288px (check column/alignment classes)
